---
title: "Structure_Learning_Visualisations"
author: "Jonah Yallop"
date: "2026-02-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)
```

# 1. Alpha sensitivity visualisations

```{r}
# -----------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Skeleton SHD vs sample size for different alpha
# -----------------------------------------------------------

insurance_alpha_pc <- ggplot(alpha_sensitivity_pc_insurance$summary, 
       aes(x = sample_size, 
           y = mean_skeleton_shd, 
           colour = factor(alpha))) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Sample Size",
    y = "Skeleton SHD",
    colour = expression(alpha),
    title = "PC-Stable Algorithm"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(20, 45)) +
  theme_minimal()


insurance_alpha_mmhc <- ggplot(alpha_sensitivity_mmhc_insurance$summary, 
       aes(x = sample_size, 
           y = mean_skeleton_shd, 
           colour = factor(alpha))) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Sample Size",
    y = "Skeleton SHD",
    colour = expression(alpha),
    title = "MMHC Algorithm"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(20, 45)) +
  theme_minimal()


insurance_alpha_combined <- insurance_alpha_pc + plot_spacer() + insurance_alpha_mmhc +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 0.1, 1), guides = "collect") & 
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 10),
    axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10))
  )

insurance_alpha_combined


# -----------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Normalised SHD vs sample size for different alpha
# -----------------------------------------------------------

insurance_alpha_pc_norm <- ggplot(alpha_sensitivity_pc_water$summary, 
       aes(x = sample_size, 
           y = mean_norm_shd, 
           colour = factor(alpha))) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Sample Size",
    y = "Skeleton SHD",
    colour = expression(alpha),
    title = "PC-Stable Algorithm"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


insurance_alpha_mmhc_norm <- ggplot(alpha_sensitivity_mmhc_water$summary, 
       aes(x = sample_size, 
           y = mean_norm_shd, 
           colour = factor(alpha))) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Sample Size",
    y = "Skeleton SHD",
    colour = expression(alpha),
    title = "MMHC Algorithm"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


insurance_alpha_combined_norm <- insurance_alpha_pc_norm + plot_spacer() + insurance_alpha_mmhc_norm +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 0.1, 1), guides = "collect") & 
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 10),
    axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10))
  )

insurance_alpha_combined_norm
```

```{r}
# Combine data into one dataframe

alpha_sensitivity_combined <- bind_rows(
  
  alpha_sensitivity_pc_insurance$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Insurance", Algorithm = "PC-Stable"),
  
  alpha_sensitivity_mmhc_insurance$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Insurance", Algorithm = "MMHC"),
  
  alpha_sensitivity_pc_alarm$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Alarm", Algorithm = "PC-Stable"),
  
  alpha_sensitivity_mmhc_alarm$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Alarm", Algorithm = "MMHC"),
  
  alpha_sensitivity_pc_water$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Water", Algorithm = "PC-Stable"),
  
  alpha_sensitivity_mmhc_water$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Water", Algorithm = "MMHC"),
  
  alpha_sensitivity_pc_andes$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Andes", Algorithm = "PC-Stable"),
  
  alpha_sensitivity_mmhc_andes$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Andes", Algorithm = "MMHC")
)

alpha_sensitivity_combined$Algorithm <- factor(
  alpha_sensitivity_combined$Algorithm,
  levels = c("PC-Stable", "MMHC")
)

alpha_sensitivity_plot <- ggplot(
  alpha_sensitivity_combined,
  aes(
    x = sample_size,
    y = mean_norm_shd,
    color = factor(alpha),
    group = alpha
  )
) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(Network),
    cols = vars(Algorithm),
    switch = "y",
    scales = "free_y"
  ) +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.25, 0.86)) +
  labs(
    x = "Sample Size",
    y = "Mean Normalised SHD",
    color = expression(alpha)
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    #aspect.ratio = 1
  )

alpha_sensitivity_plot

ggsave("Alpha_Sensitivity.png", alpha_sensitivity_plot, width = 7, height = 4.8)
```

# 2. Objective function sensitivity


```{r}
# Combining data in one dataframe for plotting

objective_sensitivity_combined <- bind_rows(
  objective_sensitivity_hc_insurance$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Insurance", Algorithm = "Hill-Climbing"),

  objective_sensitivity_mmhc_insurance$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Insurance", Algorithm = "MMHC"),

  objective_sensitivity_hc_alarm$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Alarm", Algorithm = "Hill-Climbing"),

  objective_sensitivity_mmhc_alarm$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Alarm", Algorithm = "MMHC"),

  objective_sensitivity_hc_water$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Water", Algorithm = "Hill-Climbing"),

  objective_sensitivity_mmhc_water$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Water", Algorithm = "MMHC"),
  
  objective_sensitivity_hc_andes$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Andes", Algorithm = "Hill-Climbing"),

  objective_sensitivity_mmhc_andes$summary %>%
    mutate(Network = "Andes", Algorithm = "MMHC")
)

# Plotting mean skeleton SHD

ggplot(
  objective_sensitivity_combined,
  aes(
    x = sample_size,
    y = mean_skeleton_shd,
    color = score,
    linetype = score
  )
) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(Network),
    cols = vars(Algorithm),
    switch = "y"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Sample Size",
    y = "Mean Skeleton SHD",
    color = "Score",
    linetype = "Score"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# Plotting normalised SHD

objective_function_plot <- ggplot(
  objective_sensitivity_combined,
  aes(
    x = sample_size,
    y = mean_norm_shd,
    color = score,
    linetype = score
  )
) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(Network),
    cols = vars(Algorithm),
    switch = "y"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Sample Size",
    y = "Mean Normalised SHD",
    color = "Score",
    linetype = "Score"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

objective_function_plot

ggsave("objective_function_sensitivity.png", objective_function_plot, width = 7, height = 4.8)
```

# 3. Objective function sensitivity using precision and recall

```{r}
precision_recall_combined <- bind_rows(
  
  objective_sensitivity_hc_insurance$raw_results %>%
    filter(sample_size == 5000) %>%
    mutate(Network = "Insurance", Algorithm = "Hill-Climbing"),
  
  objective_sensitivity_mmhc_insurance$raw_results %>%
    filter(sample_size == 5000) %>%
    mutate(Network = "Insurance", Algorithm = "MMHC"),
  
  objective_sensitivity_hc_alarm$raw_results %>%
    filter(sample_size == 5000) %>%
    mutate(Network = "Alarm", Algorithm = "Hill-Climbing"),
  
  objective_sensitivity_mmhc_alarm$raw_results %>%
    filter(sample_size == 5000) %>%
    mutate(Network = "Alarm", Algorithm = "MMHC"),
  
  objective_sensitivity_hc_water$raw_results %>%
    filter(sample_size == 5000) %>%
    mutate(Network = "Water", Algorithm = "Hill-Climbing"),
  
  objective_sensitivity_mmhc_water$raw_results %>%
    filter(sample_size == 5000) %>%
    mutate(Network = "Water", Algorithm = "MMHC"),

  objective_sensitivity_hc_andes$raw_results %>%
    filter(sample_size == 5000) %>%
    mutate(Network = "Andes", Algorithm = "Hill-Climbing"),
    
  objective_sensitivity_mmhc_andes$raw_results %>%
    filter(sample_size == 5000) %>%
    mutate(Network = "Andes", Algorithm = "MMHC")
)

precision_recall_objective_plot <- ggplot(
  precision_recall_combined,
  aes(
    x = recall,
    y = precision,
    color = score
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.005, height = 0.005, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = 3) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(Network),
    cols = vars(Algorithm),
    switch = "y"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.2, 1),
                  ylim = c(0.2, 1.05)) +
  labs(
    x = "Recall",
    y = "Precision",
    color = "Objective Function"
  ) +
  #theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    #aspect.ratio = 1
  )

precision_recall_objective_plot

ggsave("AIC_BIC_Precision_Recall.png", precision_recall_objective_plot, width = 7, height = 4.8)
```

## Structural error decompositions

```{r}
base_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 11)
  )

dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)

p_full <- ggplot(structural_decomp_df, aes(x = network, y = mean_norm_full_shd,
                                colour = algorithm, group = algorithm)) +
  geom_line(position = dodge, linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(position = dodge, size = 2.8) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_norm_full_shd - sd_shd,
                    ymax = mean_norm_full_shd + sd_shd),
                width = 0.08, position = dodge, linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Network",
    y = "Normalised SHD",
    title = "Normalised Structural Hamming Distance",
    color = "Algorithm"
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("HC"="#1b9e77","PC"="#d95f02","MMHC"="#7570b3")) +
  base_theme +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.key.width = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 11)
  )

p_skeleton <- ggplot(structural_decomp_df, aes(x = network, y = mean_norm_skeleton_shd,
                                    colour = algorithm, group = algorithm)) +
  geom_line(position = dodge, linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(position = dodge, size = 2.8) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_norm_skeleton_shd - sd_skeleton_shd,
                    ymax = mean_norm_skeleton_shd + sd_skeleton_shd),
                width = 0.08, position = dodge, linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Network",
    y = "Normalised Skeleton SHD",
    color = "Algorithm"
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("HC"="#1b9e77","PC"="#d95f02","MMHC"="#7570b3")) +
  base_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_orientation <- ggplot(structural_decomp_df, aes(x = network, y = mean_norm_orientation_shd,
                                        colour = algorithm, group = algorithm)) +
  geom_line(position = dodge, linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(position = dodge, size = 2.8) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_norm_orientation_shd - sd_orientation_shd,
                    ymax = mean_norm_orientation_shd + sd_orientation_shd),
                width = 0.08, position = dodge, linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Network",
    y = "Normalised Orientation SHD",
    color = "Algorithm"
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("HC"="#1b9e77","PC"="#d95f02","MMHC"="#7570b3")) +
  base_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_decomp <- p_skeleton + p_orientation +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Decomposition of Structural Errors",
    subtitle = "Skeleton vs Orientation Components"
  )

p_combined <- (p_skeleton + p_orientation) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Decomposition of Structural Errors"
  ) &
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.key.width = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 11)
  )

p_combined
p_full
```
